diagrams.title: Air Pollution Classification
diagrams.description: Shows classification of air pollutants into primary and secondary categories
diagrams.purpose: Understand the difference between directly emitted and chemically formed pollutants

diagrams.title: Greenhouse Effect Mechanism
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how greenhouse gases trap heat in Earth's atmosphere
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how greenhouse effect causes global warming

diagrams.title: Air Pollution Sources
diagrams.description: Categorization of pollution sources in urban environments
diagrams.purpose: Identify and categorize different pollution sources

diagrams.title: AQI Scale
diagrams.description: Visual representation of Air Quality Index categories and health implications
diagrams.purpose: Understand air quality levels and associated health advisories
